{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"warmed coins melt spy holes
in frost fronds the red sun flames
school milk thaws on pipes","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"},{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"pencil shavings smell
sharp as harvest straws chalk wax
crayon "Number One"","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"},{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"dad's waistcoat yields pinched
smokes pencil stubs his dad's watch
HUSH! Six-o-clock News","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"},{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"old soldier he hefts
my brother's kitbag through snow
to the train... mum cries","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"},{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"by frames memory unwinds from sixty years
railway tracks...snow... buttons bright as tears","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"}],"nodeType":"document"}
